summary: Verified rebrand from iMOs to i'M On Social. All 10 features tested and working correctly: Forgot password page has light theme, Privacy/Terms pages have proper legal formatting with numbered sections and blue accents, Pricing shows $79 Starter and $99 Professional with 'Most Popular' badge, Landing page and all 4 ad pages updated to light/blue theme.

forgot_password_light_theme.details: Page renders with white background, email input visible, 'Send Reset Code' blue button (#007AFF), progress dots present

privacy_page_legal_format.details: LEGAL label visible (blue), Privacy Policy title with 10 numbered sections, blue left border on intro paragraph, proper formatting

terms_page_legal_format.details: LEGAL label visible (blue), Terms of Service title with 13 numbered sections, blue left border on intro paragraph

pricing_starter_79.details: $79 price visible for Starter plan, old $49 price NOT present

pricing_professional_99.details: $99 price visible for Professional plan, 'Most Popular' badge displayed correctly

landing_page_light_theme.details: Body background: rgb(255, 255, 255), CSS --bg: #FFFFFF, CSS --gold: #007AFF (blue), CTA button: rgb(0, 122, 255), Nav background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92) - NO dark/gold remnants

ad_digital_card_light_theme.details: Body background: rgb(255, 255, 255), CSS --bg: #FFFFFF, CSS --accent: #007AFF, CTA button: rgb(0, 122, 255) blue

ad_reviews_light_theme.details: Body background: rgb(255, 255, 255), CSS --bg: #FFFFFF, CSS --accent: #007AFF, CTA button: rgb(0, 122, 255) blue

ad_showcase_light_theme.details: Body background: rgb(255, 255, 255), CSS --bg: #FFFFFF, CSS --accent: #007AFF, CTA button: rgb(0, 122, 255) blue

ad_autopilot_light_theme.details: Body background: rgb(255, 255, 255), CSS --bg: #FFFFFF, CSS --accent: #007AFF, CTA button: rgb(0, 122, 255) blue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebrand testing complete. All pages successfully updated from dark/gold iMOs theme to light/blue i'M On Social theme. Static HTML pages (landing.html, ad-*.html) served from /app/frontend/public/. React pages (/imos/*, /auth/*) are Expo web pages. Twilio SMS remains MOCKED.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Mocked - not testing actual SMS sending
